title: Help with early stage prostate cancer
body:
Hi all,
Recently, a loved one was diagnosed with prostate cancer. Luckily, it's in the very early stages. The doctor has recommended that he surgically remove it but I read that it often comes back with a vengeance after the surgery. I understand that cannabis oil can help but am confused after my research. I'm not sure if higher concentrations of thc or cbd are beneficial. If anyone has gone down the cannabis route, could you please offer some advice and guidance? Thank you!
